title: Zakira.Replay Browser-Discovered Captions
description: Inventory of caption files (.vtt / .srt) the Playwright browser-capture network interceptor saw the page download during playback. Written to captions/discovered.json when at least one caption response was captured. Each entry's RelativePath points at the persisted file under the run's captions/ directory.

originalLanguage.description: Source language of the video as reported by yt-dlp metadata when available; useful for orchestrators picking among captured caption languages. Null when not known.

url.description: Original network URL the page fetched, with all query string parameters intact (so SAS tokens and language selectors are preserved for audit).

relativePath.description: Path of the persisted caption file relative to the run directory (e.g. `captions/browser-0001.vtt`).

inferredLanguage.description: Best-effort BCP-47 language code inferred from the URL (e.g. `en-US`, `fr`, `zh-Hans`). Null when no signal is present.

languageSource.description: Identifier of the heuristic that produced the inferredLanguage (e.g. `url-Caption_<lang>`, `url-filename`, `url-path-segment`, `url-query-lang`). Useful for triaging false positives.

contentSha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the caption file body. Used to dedupe within and across runs.
